mapper.select: select (select count(1) from campus_merchant) as merchantCount, (select count(1) from campus_dish) as dishCount, (select count(1) from campus_package) as packageCount, (select count(1) from campus_study_room) as studyRoomCount, (select count(1) from campus_activity) as activityCount

select (select count(1) from campus_merchant where id in ) as merchantCount, (select count(1) from campus_dish where merchant_id in ) as dishCount, (select count(1) from campus_package where merchant_id in ) as packageCount, (select count(1) from campus_study_room) as studyRoomCount, (select count(1) from campus_activity) as activityCount

select date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as statDate, count(1) as statValue from campus_user where created_at >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 30 day) group by date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') order by statDate
select m.name as statName, count(o.id) as statValue from campus_order o inner join campus_merchant m on m.id = o.merchant_id group by m.id, m.name order by statValue desc
select m.name as statName, count(o.id) as statValue from campus_order o inner join campus_merchant m on m.id = o.merchant_id where o.merchant_id in group by m.id, m.name order by statValue desc

select concat(hour(start_time), ':00-', hour(end_time), ':00') as statName, count(1) as statValue from campus_reservation_record where status = 'BOOKED' group by concat(hour(start_time), ':00-', hour(end_time), ':00') order by statName

select a.title as statName, count(r.id) as statValue from campus_activity a left join campus_activity_registration r on a.id = r.activity_id and r.status = 'REGISTERED' group by a.id, a.title order by statValue desc

select m.name as merchantName, cast(coalesce(sum(case when o.status = 'PAID' then o.total_amount else 0 end), 0) as decimal(10, 2)) as revenue, count(o.id) as orderCount, concat( round( case when count(o.id) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when o.status = 'CANCELLED' then 1 else 0 end) / count(o.id) * 100 end , 1), '%' ) as refundRate from campus_merchant m left join campus_order o on o.merchant_id = m.id and o.created_at >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 30 day) group by m.id, m.name order by revenue desc, orderCount desc, m.id asc

select m.name as merchantName, cast(coalesce(sum(case when o.status = 'PAID' then o.total_amount else 0 end), 0) as decimal(10, 2)) as revenue, count(o.id) as orderCount, concat( round( case when count(o.id) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when o.status = 'CANCELLED' then 1 else 0 end) / count(o.id) * 100 end , 1), '%' ) as refundRate from campus_merchant m left join campus_order o on o.merchant_id = m.id and o.created_at >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 30 day) where m.id in group by m.id, m.name order by revenue desc, orderCount desc, m.id asc
